2026-04-24.patch_summary: This patch refactors the fuse_link() function in the Linux kernel's fs/fuse/dir.c file to remove a goto statement and replace it with a direct return, improving code cleanliness and maintainability. The patch also changes an -ENOSYS check to be an else if condition, making the code more readable. There are no functional changes as a result of this refactoring.
